UnitPay is the monetization OS for AI companies. Design pricing, run usage-based billing, track inference costs and margins in real time, and show every customer the value they're actually getting — all in one system. Built ground-up for AI-native products: credits, hybrid pricing, per-token metering, cost tracking. Free until you hit $500K ARR.

What We Do Flexible AI-Native Pricing: Launch outcome-, usage-, subscription- or hybrid-pricing experiments in minutes with zero redeploys. results.title: Best Payment Gateways for Small Businesses
results.content: to you, then you should definitely consider Stacks, a flat rate subscription payment processor that gives you an all-in-one merchant solution for all your swiped, keyed, mobile, and contactless payments, as well as month-to-month billing. This is a great solution for small and midsize businesses because there are no hidden cost and no long-term contracts, which also means no early termination fees. And the Stax Pay dashboard is pretty userfriendly and gives you one simple place to manage all of your payment processing as well as convenient tools for invoicing, billing, inventory, reporting, and e-commerce. On top of all that, Stacks can save merchants as much as 40% on their processing fees with a membership plan that uses their Interchange Plus pricing. So, you pay a monthly subscription
